title: Remember the Day
writer: Philip Dunning, Philo Higley, Tess Slesinger
actors: Claudette Colbert, John Payne, Shepperd Strudwick
plot: Elderly schoolteacher Nora Trinell, waiting to meet presidential nominee Dewey Roberts, recalls him as her student back in 1916 and his relation to Dan Hopkins, the man she married and lost.
